description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a Frontal Alpha Asymmetry analysis using the playback file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. The dashboard must display two separate Band Power widgets: one configured to show only Channel 1 and the other configured to show only Channel 2. With the data streaming, save a screenshot of the dashboard to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/asymmetry_setup.png.
